author: Marco
msg: I’m running an sms one that’s paying, but you need a new sim with sms capability. Pays $0.40 per day to rent your number for sms. Not really scalable easily. I have 6 phones online, but you register and wait for them to “sell” it before you start getting paid. Can’t use the sms for anything else. Running Unity on the phones as well, so $0.4000001 per day.
